_comment: Supplementary terms — skills, tools, and knowledge relevant to your background but NOT on your resume. The alignment scorer uses these as a secondary positive signal.
_instructions: Add items below. 'proficiency' can be: expert | advanced | intermediate | beginner. 'type' can be: skill | tool | function | methodology | domain | soft_skill | certification | concept.

terms.notes: Replace this with your own supplementary terms
